productDescription: We're an agency that owns and operates 140+ gyms and studios. We sell gym owners the same AI-powered marketing, sales, and member-retention systems we run inside our own locations — as a done-for-you service with coaching.
painPoints:
- Lead flow is unpredictable — some months you're slammed with sign-ups, other months you're staring at an empty pipeline
- Dormant members sitting in your CRM that nobody's followed up with in months
- No real system for turning your happy clients into a referral engine
- No process for getting consistent Google reviews month after month
- Trainers and front-desk staff don't have a consistent sales process — every consultation feels different
- Drowning in admin work — you're doing marketing, sales, ops, coaching all yourself
- Classes running half-empty during certain time slots and you don't know how to fill them
- Local competition opening up and cutting into your member base
- Hard to compete with low-priced chains without dropping your own pricing
valueProps:
- AI-powered lead nurture that texts every lead within seconds and qualifies them 24/7 — no more leads going cold while you're coaching
- Dormant member reactivation campaigns proven to recover 5-figure revenue from your existing CRM (Whitney pulled $80K in 5 weeks)
- Member referral systems that turn your happy clients into a consistent growth channel
- Automated Google review collection that compounds month over month — without you ever asking
- Trainer and front-desk sales playbooks battle-tested across our own 140+ locations
- Done-for-you marketing campaigns — we run them, you focus on coaching and culture
- Real coaching from people who actually operate gyms, not theoretical agency consultants
- Proven scaling systems used to take operators from 2 to 11 locations and beyond (Brandon did it in 28 months with $4.7M in contracts)
